title: Astonish Kitchen Cleaner, Vegan And Cruelty Free And Blended With Natural Oils, 750ml, Zesty Lemon
features: Hygienically Cleans: Decontaminate your home and keep your family and pets safe and protected with extremely powerful cleaning trigger spray. Plus, Astonish is proud to be cruelty free and vegan friendly
Tough on Dirt and Grime: A hard working versatile cleaner for a thorough full house clean, our cleaning sprays are specially formulated to give an intense disinfection for simple hassle-free cleaning
Kills Bacteria: Quickly eliminate germs and bugs including E.coli, Salmonella, Listeria and MRSA around the home by sanitising surfaces with this anti-bacterial cleansing solution

Lasting Fresh Scent: Banish those unpleasant odours with the beautiful sharp scent of Zesty Lemon. It’s also great as a refreshing deodoriser in sinks and drains, fragrances the air with a pure refreshing aroma

Easy to Use: Safe for use on most non-porous, hard surfaces, sinks, cookers, door knobs, kitchen tops, floors, light switches, taps. Making your housework simple and hassle-free with is versatile spray
description: Product Description Astonish Kitchen Cleaner Trigger Spray Removes Grease 750ml Ingredients Aqua, Butoxydiglycol, Undeceth-40, C9-11 Pareth-3, Tetrasodium Edta, Sodium Oleate, Parfum, Alkyl Dimethyl Betaine, Diethylene Glycol, 1,2 Propanediamine, C10-c16 Alkylderivatives, Reaction Product With 2-chloro Acetic Acids, Ci 19140 Directions How to Use: Spray and wipe with a clean damp cloth or sponge. For stubborn stains and grease spray and leave for 2 minutes before wiping. Rinse food contact surfaces after use.Caution: Do not use on unsealed wood, porous surfaces or unglazed tiles. Avoid prolonged contact with paintwork, gold plating and lacquered or varnished wood.Causes serious eye irritation. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Read label before use. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Wear eye protection. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do so. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Avoid breathing spray. Wash hands after use. Box Contains Kitchen Cleaner See more
